title: Rules4Worlds
description: A library mod for fabric mod developers that enables you to easily create world-specific gamerules.
body:
# About
Have you ever found yourself struggling with adding gamerules in your Fabric mod? Rules4Worlds aims to solve this problem by allowing you to easily create world-specific gamerules using your own configuration command, while still providing the flexibility to utilize custom setting types. It also supports categories and the use of a configuration file (currently only supports JSON).

# How to use
To learn how to use this mod, please refer to the instructions provided in the [wiki](https://github.com/EternalFlame06/Rules4Worlds/wiki) of my repository.

# Note
This mod is still in early development, so you may encounter bugs. Please note that both features and code are subject to change. If you discover any bugs or have ideas for improvements regarding the code, documentation, or features, feel free to share them with me through the repository's issue tracker.

# Explore
Are you in search of an easy-to-use, fully customizable and versatile quality of life teleportation mod? Whether you've been looking for one or not, check out my other mod: [WarpUtils](https://modrinth.com/mod/warputils)
